paper_title: TWO NEW ALKALOIDS AND A CARBOHYDRATE COMPOUND FROM THE SPECIES Hydrocotyle bonariensis COMM. EX LAM., FAMILY APIACEAE

entities.id: Two new alkaloids and a carbohydrate compound from the species Hydrocotyle bonariensis Comm. Ex lam., family apiaceae
entities.description: Research paper title regarding the isolation and identification of chemical compounds.
Researcher and lead author from Can Tho University.

entities.id: College of Natural Sciences, Can Tho University

entities.description: The study of chemicals derived from plants.
The process of extracting nitrogenous organic compounds from plant material.
Extraction method using ethanol acidification at room temperature.
The use of chloroform to isolate isoquinoline alkaloids.
Separation technique used to isolate pure compounds from the extract.
Nuclear Magnetic Resonance used for structural elucidation.
High-resolution Electrospray Ionization Mass Spectrometry for molecular weight determination.
Data table containing NMR and MS data for compounds 1 and 2.
Data table containing NMR and MS data for compound 3.
The amount of compound 1 isolated from the plant.
The amount of compound 2 isolated from the plant.
The amount of compound 3 isolated from the plant.
Mass-to-charge ratio found for compound 1 via HR-ESI-MS.
